WarpColumn.description:
A single column declared in a warp schema contract.

Defines the expected name, type, nullability, and optional default
for a target table column.

name.description: Column name as it appears in the target table.
name.title: Name

nullable.description: Whether the column allows null values.
nullable.title: Nullable

default.description: Default value for warp-only column append. None means null.
default.title: Default

discovered.description: Marker for columns added by adaptive drift detection. Remove this flag to signal intentional curation.
discovered.title: Discovered

WarpColumn.title: WarpColumn

WarpKeys.description:
Key declarations for a warp schema contract.

Documentation metadata identifying surrogate and business keys.
Not enforced at runtime — used for plan/explain output and
downstream tooling.

surrogate.description: Name of the surrogate key column.
surrogate.title: Surrogate

business.description: Names of the business key columns.
business.title: Business

WarpKeys.title: WarpKeys

description:
Typed configuration for a .warp file declaring a target table schema.

A warp defines the intended shape of a target table: which columns
should exist, their types, nullability, and optional defaults.
Cross-field validators ensure column name uniqueness and key
reference integrity.

config_version.description: Schema version for the warp file (e.g. '1.0').
config_version.title: Config Version

description.description: Human-readable description of the warp contract.
description.title: Description

columns.description: Ordered list of column declarations for the target table.
columns.title: Columns

auto_generated.description: Marker indicating this warp was auto-generated from pipeline output.
auto_generated.title: Auto Generated

title: WarpConfig
